shadow_event.query:
# Context Refresh Failed

workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core

Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size

Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.

transcript.content: 会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：
点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；
这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
根因就是你贴出来的这句： ```text /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/.../Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size ```

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.

decision.archive_summary: Earlier standalone-extension UI changes appear resolved: removed context meter, show `Ctx: no workspace` outside repo with tooltip clarifying bound workspace path, independent refresh per VS Code window/workspace, and improved status-bar click responsiveness by opening immediately and refreshing asynchronously.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is a new concrete failure report on the same active `Ctx: error` / context refresh problem, so this stays on the same topic (`continue`). The current diagnosis depends on the recent error-handling exchange and the prior assistant analysis of the failure command, so keep `t6`-`t11` raw. The earlier UI-change discussion in `t1`-`t5` is solved and not needed for the next reply, making it a good eviction candidate.

applied.archiveSummary: Earlier standalone-extension UI changes appear resolved: removed context meter, show `Ctx: no workspace` outside repo with tooltip clarifying bound workspace path, independent refresh per VS Code window/workspace, and improved status-bar click responsiveness by opening immediately and refreshing asynchronously.
